title: tarrietia rubiginosa
intro: Tarrietia rubiginosa, also known as the Yellow Elder or Yellow Myrtle, is a species of flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tarrietia rubiginosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Tarrietia rubiginosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
